subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon, when the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی اذ ارتفع حفیف سدره المنتهی و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
